title: MaxHold No-Drilling/Suction Cup Deep Rectangular Storage Basket - Vaccum System - Stainless Steel Never Rust - for Bathroom & Kitchen
features: 🛁 MAXHOLD LOADING ABILITY - maximum loading is up to 20lbs.
🛁 EASY INSTALLATION - no tools, no drilling, no screwing. WATCH HOW TO INSTALL: https://youtu.be/ojlWPyA7puc
🛁 MULTIFUNCTIONAL - in bathroom, in kitchen , on refrigerator and any smooth, non-porous surface.
🛁 NEVER RUST - Real 18/8 Stainless Steel metal material and plating ABS plastic suction cup.

🛁 REMOVABLE - reuse and no surface damage.Please check your wall style before choosing this product. Please contact us if the product still doesn't work as expected and we will help to solve it. All emails will be replied within 12 hours.
description: Product Description ------------------------------------------------------------------\Professional Organization/--------------------------------------------------------- About MaxHold Suction System MaxHold is the market leading in suction cup of bathroom accessories and kitchen accessories. Based on patented technology, MaxHold products are innovative to use industrial rubber instead of PVC OR TBR. The rubber has features of water proof, oil resistance, cold and hot resistance. Modern design looks stunning with any bathroom & kitchen decor. Amazing Holding Power Modern design looks stunning with any bathroom & kitchen decor.Supported by patented suction system, each MaxHold suction cup could load not only 10lbs, not only 20lbs but more than 30lbs, which has been proved by the SGS test organization. MaxHold Deep Rectangular Basket Packing List: 2 suction cup 1 stainless steel basket 1 instructions booklet Dimensions： suction cup diameter - 7.3 cm stainless steel basket – 25(L)*11(W)*10(H)cm Features: • STRONG LOADING ABILITY - maximum loading is more than 30lbs. • EASY INSTALLATION-no tools, no drilling, no screwing. • NEVER RUST-made of SUS304 stainless steel and plating ABS plastic suction cup. • REMOVABLE-reuse and no surface damage Caution: • Suction cup works best on smooth and non-porous surface -SMOOTH glazed tile / glass /steel/mirror/PVC surface/painting surface. • Doesn't work on porous surfaces-concave(convex)/cambered/porous tile/rustic tile/mosaic tile/travertine tile/porous marble/concrete and lime wall surface. Installation: • Clean - clean the mounting surface thoroughly. • Press - press the flat rubber base to exhaust the internal air lightly. • Position - position the metal part with the suction cup. • Twist - twist the knob clockwise to lock until fully tight
